mapper.select: SELECT member_streamer_profile_seq AS memberStreamerProfileSeq, member_seq AS memberSeq, instagram_url AS instagramUrl, youtube_url AS youtubeUrl, soop_channel_url AS soopChannelUrl, company_category_code AS companyCategoryCode, blood_type AS bloodType, career_history AS careerHistory FROM member_streamer_profile WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_streamer_profile WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_streamer_profile ( member_seq, instagram_url, youtube_url, soop_channel_url, company_category_code, blood_type, career_history, create_dt, modify_dt ) VALUES ( #{memberSeq}, #{p.instagramUrl}, #{p.youtubeUrl}, #{p.soopChannelUrl}, #{p.companyCategoryCode}, #{p.bloodType}, #{p.careerHistory}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE member_streamer_profile SET instagram_url = #{p.instagramUrl}, youtube_url = #{p.youtubeUrl}, soop_channel_url = #{p.soopChannelUrl}, company_category_code = #{p.companyCategoryCode}, blood_type = #{p.bloodType}, career_history = #{p.careerHistory}, modify_dt = NOW() WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq}
